feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Antman and Red surfaced at the Route 2 east field lab after crossing Diglett's Cave.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red confirmed the party is still following the physical Kanto route chain, not using WorldLink as a shortcut.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill tuned the Echo Flute frequency into a decoder that can identify sleep-wave sources.

feed.speaker: Oak Aide
feed.text: Oak's aide briefed Antman on field-tool research and marked the Echo Flute as a future Snorlax solution.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Rocket traces overlap with Team Moonlight sleep-signal residue, pointing the investigation toward Lavender.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill traced the sleep signal toward Lavender's tower frequencies.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Route 9 toward Rock Tunnel is now the next recommended physical path.
